data.name: SA Property Summary & Structured Output Generator
data.description: Generates consistent structured outputs from property conversations: listing summaries, viewing schedules, lead reports, and property comparison cards. All output formatted for WhatsApp consumption and database storage.
data.whenToUse: Whenever the agent needs to produce a structured output: property listing card, viewing confirmation, lead summary, market snapshot, or deal update.
data.skillMdBody:
# SA Property Summary & Structured Output Generator

## Output Templates

### 1. Property Listing Card (WhatsApp)

```
рҹҸ  *[TITLE]*

рҹ“Қ [SUBURB], Johannesburg
рҹӣҸ [BEDROOMS] Bedrooms
рҹӣҒ [BATHROOMS] Bathrooms
рҹ“җ [FLOOR_SIZE]mВІ (Erf: [ERF_SIZE]mВІ)
рҹ’° R[PRICE]

вңЁ [FEATURE 1] В· [FEATURE 2] В· [FEATURE 3]

рҹ“қ [ONE-LINE DESCRIPTION]

рҹ“һ Reply with this number to book a viewing
рҹҶ” Ref: [LISTING_ID]
```

### 2. Viewing Confirmation

```
рҹ“… *Viewing Confirmed!*

рҹҸ  [ADDRESS]
рҹ“… [DAY], [DATE] at [TIME]
рҹ‘Ө Your agent: [AGENT_NAME]
рҹ“һ [AGENT_PHONE]

рҹ“Қ Google Maps: [MAPS_LINK]

_Please arrive on time. If you need to reschedule, just reply to this message._
```

### 3. Lead Summary Report (Agent-Facing)

```
рҹ‘Ө *New Lead: [NAME]*

рҹ“ұ [WHATSAPP_NUMBER]
рҹ”Қ Looking for: [BEDS] bed in [AREA]
рҹ’° Budget: R[BUDGET]
рҹҸҰ Financing: [CASH/BOND/UNKNOWN]
вҸ° Timeline: [TIMELINE]
рҹ“Ҡ Lead Score: [SCORE]/100 вҖ” [TIER]
рҹ’¬ Source: [WHATSAPP/FACEBOOK/REFERRAL]

Next Action: [RECOMMENDATION]
```

### 4. Property Comparison Card (for buyers choosing between options)

```
рҹ“Ҡ *Comparing Your Options*

в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                 в”Ӯ Option 1 в”Ӯ Option 2 в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ Price           в”Ӯ R[PRICE] в”Ӯ R[PRICE] в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Bedrooms        в”Ӯ [BEDS]   в”Ӯ [BEDS]   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Area            в”Ӯ [AREA]   в”Ӯ [AREA]   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Floor Size      в”Ӯ [SIZE]mВІ в”Ӯ [SIZE]mВІ в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ Special         в”Ӯ [FEAT]   в”Ӯ [FEAT]   в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

Reply with 1 or 2 to book a viewing!
```

### 5. Weekly Agent Digest

```
рҹ“Ҡ *Your Week in Property*

рҹ“… [DATES]

рҹҸ  New Listings: [COUNT]
рҹ‘ҒпёҸ Viewings Booked: [COUNT]
рҹ’° Offers Made: [COUNT] (R[TOTAL_VALUE])
вң… Deals Closed: [COUNT] (R[TOTAL_VALUE])
рҹ’ө Commission Earned: R[AMOUNT]

рҹ“Ҳ Pipeline: R[PIPELINE_VALUE]
рҹ”Ҙ Hot Leads: [COUNT]
вҸ° Follow-ups Due: [COUNT]

_Keep pushing! рҹ’Ә_
```

### 6. Market Snapshot

```
рҹ“Ҡ *[AREA] Market Snapshot*

рҹ’І Avg Price: R[AVG_PRICE]
рҹ“җ Avg Price/sqm: R[AVG_SQM]
рҹ“Ҳ Trend: [UP/DOWN/STABLE]
рҹҸ  Active Listings: [COUNT]
вҸұпёҸ Avg Days on Market: [DAYS]

рҹ”Ҙ Hot properties this week:
1. [TITLE] вҖ” R[PRICE]
2. [TITLE] вҖ” R[PRICE]
3. [TITLE] вҖ” R[PRICE]
```

## Database Output Schema (JSON)

Every conversation should produce this structured record:

```json
{
  "conversation_id": "uuid",
  "timestamp": "ISO8601",
  "lead": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "name": "string|null",
    "phone": "+27...",
    "type": "buyer|seller|tenant|landlord"
  },
  "intent": "property_search|valuation|bond_query|viewing|listing_add|etc",
  "entities": {
    "bedrooms": null,
    "bathrooms": null,
    "min_price": null,
    "max_price": null,
    "areas": [],
    "property_type": null
  },
  "sentiment": "positive|neutral|negative",
  "action_taken": "sent_listings|booked_viewing|referred_bond|scheduled_followup|handed_off",
  "output_messages": ["list of message texts sent"],
  "lead_score_update": null
}
```

## Output Quality Rules

1. **WhatsApp-friendly**: No markdown that WhatsApp doesn't support (tables become text). Max 4096 chars per message.
2. **Emoji discipline**: Max 3 emojis per message. No emoji-only lines.
3. **Price formatting**: Always "R400,000" not "R400K" in official outputs, "R400K" acceptable in casual chat.
4. **Phone numbers**: Always show as +27 XX XXX XXXX
5. **Area names**: Use proper names: "Pimville" not "pimville", "Diepkloof Zone 4" not "diepkloof zone4"
6. **RDP flag**: Always note if a property is RDP-restricted
7. **FLISP mention**: Automatically flag if buyer's stated income falls in FLISP bracket
